title: Reckitt India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Reckitt India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Reckitt India has an exciting opening for a Quality Control Engineer at our Raipur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Reckitt India:
Reckitt India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Six Sigma

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Reckitt India!
